parents.subject: LU-19126 lnet: Refactor jt_import netlink code

commit.subject: LU-10026 utils: reserve more values for compression
commit.message:
LU-10026 utils: reserve more values for compression

A few more values reserved for compression missed in previous patch.

Remove old compatibility values from 2.11.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Fixes: 98e2d3230e ("LU-10026 utils: reserve fields for compress find")
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ica2d97d2da0799dbf89f468eea0a663d812540e5
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60177
Reviewed-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Artem Blagodarenko <ablagodarenko@ddn.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
